top_risk: Agent-runtime task completion reliability — tasks report status transitions to 'completed' before verifying that requested artifacts have been successfully written, enabling downstream consumers to accept empty or incomplete output. Supported by T-1003 (critical: agent task reports success before writing artifact) and T-1005 (high: tool-call timeout leaves task in unknown state).
recommended_actions: Fix agent task completion ordering — ensure artifact write confirmation occurs and is verified before status transitions to 'completed' (addresses T-1003)
Implement tool-call timeout recovery with deterministic state transitions — eliminate unknown task states after timeouts (addresses T-1005)
Fix premium-tier payment processing — resolve intermittent payment failures causing revenue loss for premium accounts (addresses T-1006)
